common.staffSelfHint: This is you — schedule your own meals

meta.title: The Club House – School Meal Management
meta.description: Platform for managing school meals, payments, packages and family accounts.

login.title: Welcome
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your portal.
login.errorCredentials: Incorrect credentials. Check your email and password.
login.registeredSuccess: Account created successfully. Now sign in.
login.registeredSuccessFor: Account created successfully for {email}. Now sign in.

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Registration for parents and guardians. You'll be able to manage children, orders and payments.
register.errorRequired: Fill in your name, email and password.
register.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
register.errorGeneric: Couldn't create the account. Please try again.
register.typeParentDesc: I have children studying at the school.
register.typeParentStaffDesc: I have children at the school and I also work there.
register.typeStaffDesc: I work at the school and will order meals for myself.
register.confirmQuestion: You are about to create your account as:
register.confirmHintParent: You'll be able to register your children and schedule their meals.
register.confirmHintParentStaff: You'll be able to register your children, schedule their meals and also your own.
register.confirmHintStaff: You'll be able to schedule your own meals. If you bring children to the school later, you can add them.

unauthorized.title: Access Denied
unauthorized.message: You don't have permission to access this section. Please contact the administrator.

publicFooter.description: Healthy and delicious meals for students. Quality nutrition prepared with love.

hero.subtitle: Easily manage your children's meals. Fresh menu, flexible packages and simple payments all in one place.

items.title: Fresh Ingredients
items.desc: Selected daily from trusted local suppliers.

items.title: Expert Chefs
items.desc: Trained staff with knowledge of child nutrition.

items.title: On Time, Fast
items.desc: Delivered on time, every time, no excuses.

items.title: 100% Quality
items.desc: Guaranteed hygiene and quality in every preparation.

usefulLinks.title: Helpful links for parents and students

items.title: Nutritionist
items.desc: Consult with our child nutrition specialists

items.title: Physical Activities
items.desc: Exercise and wellness programs for students

items.title: Contact
items.desc: Have questions? Get in touch with us

portalBenefits.title: Complete control of your children's meals
portalBenefits.subtitle: With The Club House Parent Portal you have full visibility into what your children eat, their payments and active packages.
items: Get alerts for allergies and restrictions
Check consumption history in real time
Buy monthly or annual packages at a discount
Manage multiple children from a single profile

panels.title: Panels for your role
panels.subtitle: Every user gets access to a personalized panel with the tools they need.

items.title: Administrator
items.desc: Manage users, menu, packages, payments and complete system reports.

items.title: Parent / Guardian
items.desc: Check the menu, plan meals, buy packages and pay by SINPE Móvil.

items.title: Vendor
items.desc: Log consumption, manage today's orders and validate students' active packages.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Healthy meals, simple payments, and total control in your hands.

dashboard.subtitle: General overview of The Club House system

balance.infoBullet2: Payments are applied to your accrued balance
balance.infoBullet3: The administrator will review and approve your payment
balance.amountExceedsBalance: The amount exceeds the pending balance.

balance.errorReceiptRequired: You must upload a receipt or enter a SINPE reference.
balance.errorFileTooBig: The file exceeds 4MB. Upload a lighter image or PDF.
balance.errorReceiptProcess: Couldn't process the receipt. Try again.
balance.successPayment: Payment sent successfully. It's under review by the administrator.

plan.headerSubtitle: First choose who the order is for. Then add products and set date and time in an order line.
plan.pressAddHint: Press Add on any dish to choose a child and add it right away.
plan.pressAddHintPerson: Press Add on any dish to choose who it's for and add it right away.
plan.noFoodInTab: No meals available for this tab.
plan.tryAnotherTabOrSearch: Try another tab or change the search filter.
plan.cartOrganized: Your orders are organized by day and time.
plan.cartHint: In the cart you can edit the date, remove products, or add more to an existing line.
plan.editingLineNotice: You have a line being edited without adding it to the cart.
plan.noLinesYet: You haven't added any lines to the cart yet.
plan.balanceNote: The amount is added to your pending balance. You can view and cancel it (up to 2 hours before) in History and Tracking.
plan.selectPersonToContinue: Select who the order is for to continue.
plan.errorStudentInactive: The selected student is not active.
plan.errorNoPriceForLevel: This meal doesn't have a price configured for your child's level.
plan.errorSelectChildBeforeSave: Select a child before saving the line.
plan.errorSelectPersonBeforeSave: Select a person before saving the line.
plan.errorAddOneProduct: Add at least one product to the line.
plan.errorSelectDate: Select a date for this line.
plan.errorSelectTime: Select a time for this line.
plan.errorInvalidDateTime: The selected date and time are not valid.
plan.errorEditingLine: You're already editing a line. Add it to the cart or clear it before editing another.
plan.errorEditingLineSubmit: You have a line being edited. Add it to the cart or clear it before requesting.
plan.confirmChangeChild: Each order is for a single child. If you change child, everything added to the cart will be cleared. Do you want to continue?
plan.confirmChangePerson: Each order is for a single person. If you change person, everything added to the cart will be cleared. Do you want to continue?
